page_title: Zankoku na Tenshi no These/Tamashii no Rufuran (single)
text:
is a single by Yoko Takahashi. The single was published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with the catalog number KICM-3040, it was released on 20 June 2018. https://vgmdb.net/album/76355 It contains the opening song for Neon Genesis Evangelion TV series and the main theme for the Evangelion: Death and Rebirth film.
